  children={"List Device Types"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/types"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get all existing device types (DeviceType) in your Aqara Studio.

  as={"h2"}
